scripts.component-library:storybook:publish: cd src/component-library && npm i && npm run chromatic
scripts.component-library:type-check: cd src/component-library && npm i && npm run type-check
scripts.component-library:test: cd src/component-library && npm i && npm run test
scripts.hcamain:build: cd src/hcamain && npm i && npm run build
scripts.hcamain:leprechaun: dotnet tool restore && dotnet leprechaun /c HCALeprechaun.config
scripts.hcamain:type-check: cd src/hcamain && npm i && npm run bootstrap && npm run type-check
scripts.hcamain:copy: cd src/component-library && npm i && npm run copy hcamain/src/temp
scripts.hcamain:copy:docker: cd src/component-library && npm run copy hcamain/src/temp
scripts.hcamain:copybuild: npm run hcamain:copy && npm run hcamain:build
scripts.hcamain:copy:watch: cd src/component-library && npm run watch hcamain/src/temp
scripts.microsite:leprechaun: dotnet tool restore && dotnet leprechaun /c PSGLeprechaun.config
scripts.lint: npm run hcamain:copy && npm run hcamain:type-check && npm run component-library:type-check
